criteria: Exactly one topic resolved from the 7-value enum
Exactly one playbook loaded; no sibling routes read
Tie-break favors the more specific topic (privacy/audit over governance)
On a genuine tie, one clarifying question asked rather than a silent guess
Deliverable answers the resolved topic, not the router
No router boilerplate echoed back to the user
privacy: lawful basis + retention per PII field; re-identification test passed (k/l/t)
audit-trail: complete record schema with authenticated actor; integrity chain verifiable
documentation: zero orphan columns; doc-vs-live drift = 0; named source per field
pipeline: G0-G3 evaluated, no bypass; confidence >= 0.95 enforced
strategy/governance: named owners; rules carry metric + threshold + action-on-breach
storytelling: every claim traceable to its metric; no green-as-success spin
Alfa tags applied, one per non-obvious claim
Missing required input handled as a stop, not an inference
No invented prices; criteria recommended, not vendors
No client PII reproduced in output or examples
